text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Happy birthday, Teio. The rate at which you
progress never fails to astound me.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Appreciate it, Prez! Feels like my body is finally
catching up to my drive!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm running one step further than the day before!
Reaching higher than I did yesterday! Don't be
surprised if I catch up to you soon. ♪

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You will not surpass me. Not now, not for
eternity.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Whoa, is that your declaration of victory?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Close, but not quite. As of late, I've realized
something. You and I are completely different
types of runners.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If I am solid, then you are malleable. For every
year that goes by, I am once again greeted by a
completely different you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It is an unbelievably lonely feeling, yet also a
happy one.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Teio, stand proud today. I will be watching your
future exploits with great interest.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And don't you worry! No matter how strong I get,
I'll always stay right by your side!
